## Changes

### [#696](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/696) Add Credentialing Hub server

Ports the Credentialing Hub server into Verii core as `@verii/server-credentialing-hub` and establishes `2.0.0` as the first Verii-scoped production release.

## Backward incompatibilities

This is the first `@verii/server-credentialing-hub` release from this repository. Migrations and deployment Docker remain managed by the monorepo.
